Frequently Asked Questions
1. Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Online Form Start Date?
The online application process started on 08 June 2026.
2. Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Exam Date?
The Stage-I Examination will be conducted in As Per Schedule .
3. Where can I find the syllabus for the Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme for the Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Examination are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete syllabus details.
4. Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
5. Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Recruitment Last Date?
The last date to apply online is 07 July 2026.
6. What is the last date to Update application fee Details?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 07 July 2026 .
7. How can I apply for Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Exam?
tables: RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer APO Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for

Rajasthan  Public Service Commission ( RPSC ) has released Assistant Prosecution Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer APO Vacancy can apply online from 08 June 2026 to 07 July 2026 . candidates should read the RPSC APO 2026 Vacancy  information Notification for all the information related to the RPSC exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, information and other types of information and then apply.

Rajasthan Public Service Commission (RPSC) RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer APO Recruitment 2026 Advt No. : 03/ Exam/APO/EP-1/2026-27: Short Details of Notification Sarkari Result® WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM Since 2012

Important Dates Application Begin : 08/06/2026 Last Date for Apply : 07/07/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 07/07/2026 Admit Card Available : As Per Schedule Pre Exam Date : 02/09/2026 Mains Exam Date  : 27/12/2026 Result Declared : As Per Schedule

Application Fees (OTR) General / BC/OBC Creamy Layer / Other State : 600/- OBC / BC / EWS : 400/- SC / ST : 400/- Correction Charge : 500/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Cash at Rajasthan E Mitra Portal or Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, UPI Payment Mode.

Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer APO Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/07/2027 Minimum Age : 21 Years. Maximum Age : 40 Years. Age Relaxation as per Rajasthan Public Service Commission RPSC AAO Recruitment 2026 Rules.
Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Associates Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details
Rajasthan RPSC Assistant Prosecution Officer Eligibility Details
Rajasthan Assistant Prosecution Officer (APO) NON SA
Bachelor Degree in Law (LLB) from any Recognized University in India. Working Knowledge of Hindi Devnagri and Knowledge of Rajasthani Dialects and Social Customs.

How to Fill Rajasthan Assistant Prosecution Officer Online Form 2026 Rajasthan  Public Service Commission (RPSC) has Released the Assistant Prosecution Officer 2026 Notification . Candidate Can Apply Between 08 June 2026 to 07 July 2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in RPSC Apply Online for Assistant Prosecution Officer AAO 2026. Kindly Check and College the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
